---
title: "TROPICAL_MIN_PLUS"
generated: true
description: "The min-plus tropical algebra :math:`( min, +)`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.semiring.algebras`](../nitrix-semiring-algebras.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:TROPICAL_MIN_PLUS -->
```python
TROPICAL_MIN_PLUS: StrictSemiring[Any] = StrictSemiring(monoid=(_MinMonoid()), binary_op=(_SumSemigroup()), identity=(jnp.inf), annihilator=(jnp.inf), name='tropical_min_plus', matmul_vjp=tropical_min_plus_matmul_vjp, ell_matmul_vjp=tropical_min_plus_ell_matmul_vjp)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:TROPICAL_MIN_PLUS -->
The min-plus tropical algebra $(\min, +)$.

The monoid is minimisation and the binary operation is addition, with
identity and annihilator $+\infty$. Contractions compute
shortest-path / least-cost quantities; the backward pass gathers the
subgradient at the minimising index.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
